violations.text: Observed thermometers lacking in the walk-in cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the front retail and back retail area, were not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Observed ice buildup in the bagged ice freezer. Ice shall be broken down and removed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Observed several walk-in cooler door gaskets were in poor repair/need adjustment. Per PIC gaskets are on order. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The outside dumpster was observed not covered/closed and overfilled. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered/closed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

Observed the establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Provided PIC with copy of written procedure during time of inspection. Establishment shall keep copy of written procedure readily available to inspector upon request. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Observed the hand-washing sink in the 3-bay area and retail area were lacking paper towels. PIC restocked paper towels at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Observed thermometers lacking in the walk-in cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the front retail and back retail area, were not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

Observed ice buildup in the bagged ice freezer. Also observed a little ice buildup in mini freezers located in front area of establishment. Ice shall be broken down and removed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Observed several walk-in door gaskets were in poor repair/need adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following: 1. walk-in cooler ceilings 2. walk-in cooler fans 3. walk-in cooler shelves 4. Inside walk-in cooler door frames have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Observed outside dumpster surrounded with debris. Dumpster area shall be kept cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Ice buildup observed in the bagged ice freezer. Ice shall be broken down and removed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The fan covers in the walk-in cooler had dust and biofilm 2) The racks in the walk-in cooler had dust and biofilm Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
The plumbing of the mop sink in the ware-washing area was in poor repair (observed plumbing detached from base of sink). New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The ceiling tiles in the coffee station area are in poor repair (water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The ceiling in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements as it pertains to hot holding foods. Establishment was previously instructed to cease sale of hot foods. Due to failure to comply, PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
The hand-washing sink in the front coffee area is lacking paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The ware-washing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
The faucet of the three bay sink is in poor repair (comes off of base and causes leak when turned on). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans and storage racks in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, biofilm, and soil residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The ceiling in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
Several ceiling tiles in the hot holding and coffee area were observed with heavy water staining. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
The hand-washing sink near the coffee and hot holding units was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024

The ware-washing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as sandwiches) in a display case. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024

Equipment and utensils were not sanitized after washing and rinsing them due to lack of sanitizer within the facility. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024

Several foods were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit in a display case (see temperatures). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved all TCS foods to walk-in cooler at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair: 1) The open air cooler was not holding adequate ambient temperature. Staff instructed to no longer store TCS foods in cooler until service is provided 2) The faucet of the three bay sink was not properly adjusted causing a leak at the base (faucet falls off of base) New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The fan covers in the walk-in cooler observed with dust and/or soil residue 2) The racks in the walk-in cooler observed with dust and biofilm New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
The plumbing under the left most bay/compartment of the three bay/compartment sink was in poor repair (leak observed). New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The ceiling in the walk-in cooler was observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
Several ceiling tiles in the hot holding and coffee area were observed with heavy water staining. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
